name: golang-golang-x-oauth2-google-dev
title: golang-golang-x-oauth2-google-dev
description:
Google APIs support for OAuth2
Package oauth2/google provides support for making OAuth2 authorized and
authenticated HTTP requests against Google APIs. It can additionally grant
authorization with Bearer JWT.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-golang-x-oauth2-google-dev because Google APIs support for OAuth2.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-golang-x-oauth2-google-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-golang-x-oauth2-google-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-golang-x-oauth2-google-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
